case_title: AMY TRACHTENBERG-MILLER VS. TOWER CAR WASH

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY TRACHTENBERG-MILLER, AMY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $644.49 FILED BY TRACHTENBERG-MILLER, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT TOWER CAR WASH VLADIGOR INVESTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN ROBERT WETTSTEIN--MANAGER.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRACHTENBERG-MILLER, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWER CAR WASH VLADIGOR INVESTMENTS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00, ORDER INCLUDES PART AND ONE HOUR LABOR. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:55am
APPEARANCES:
Amy Trachtenberg-Miller, Plaintiff/Respondent appears as propria persona with witness Jason Hair.
TOWER CAR WASH VLADIGOR INVESTMENTS, Defendant/Appellant NO APPEARANCE BY ANYONE.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Michelle Brant.

Amy Trachtenberg-Miller testifies on her own behalf.
Jason Hair testifies on behalf of Amy Trachtenerg-Miller.

10:00am: Matter is taken under submission. Small Claims Exhibits returned to Plaintiff.

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant; Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Judgment Entered
